name: Reviewflowz
description:
Reviewflowz is a review management tool that is built especially keeping SAAS companies in mind. It helps with getting more reviews, monitoring reviews and provide review response tools along with competitive and review analytics features. 

‍

Source: Capterra

Features:

➡️Helps monitor reviews on slack, MS teams, email and Zapier 

➡️Monitor about any review platform 

➡️GPT-4 powered assistant, Lenny

➡️Build reports and charts

Pros:

✅Get instant access to all your reviews and competitors reviews 

✅Has a powerful tagging system

✅Helps aggregate your best reviews on your site automatically

Cons:

❌Since the product is still work in progress, there are multiple bugs and glitches

❌Customers say that intricate reporting options might help and are not satisfied with the feature

❌No option to translate reviews 

Priced at 49$ Per Month
what_people_say:
“Has all of the primary features we needed, including reporting/analytics, tracking all of our sites, tagging and understanding review feedback, gated links. The Reviewflowz team has been incredible to work with, adding review sites that were unique to our business. The price for what you get and the service made it an easy decision to go with Reviewflowz. We've been using the product for about 3-4 months now and are very satisfied and continuously impressed with the support we recieve.”

‍

“Still a new product but they're releasing features quickly. This wasn't a problem for us as we were newly managing our customer reputation/reviews. The dashboards are simple, but it was more important to us that we had access to all of the data to create our own dashboards.”

*Review sourced and cited by G2*
